evals.name: single-quote-card
evals.prompt: Make me a Twitter/X card for this quote: "Premature optimization is the root of all evil." Attribute it to Donald Knuth. I want it to look clean and a bit techy. Save the PNG so I can look at it.
evals.expected_output: A rendered PNG of a single card sized for Twitter (1200x675), using a dark/techy theme, containing the quote and the attribution.

evals.name: linkedin-carousel-deck
evals.prompt: I need a LinkedIn carousel that summarizes 3 tips for better code reviews: keep PRs small, review within a day, and comment on the why not just the what. Make it a square carousel with a title slide. Render the slides.
evals.expected_output: A deck JSON with a square size and ~4 slides (title + 3 tips) rendered to numbered PNGs plus a ZIP.

evals.name: instagram-image-card
evals.prompt: Turn this into an Instagram post image: a bold headline that says "Sunset deploys" with a small visual at the top. Use the file at ./assets/logo.svg as the image. Save the PNG.
evals.expected_output: A square or portrait Instagram card with an image block at the top (the provided logo) and a bold headline below it.
